mapper.select:
SELECT ID, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, CARGO_TYPE_CODE, CARGO_TYPE_NAME, SORT_NUM, MAIN_NAME, MAIN_MOBILE, MINOR_NAME, MINOR_MOBILE, DEL_FLAG, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, update_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM M_CARGO_CATEGORY
DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND (CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME LIKE #{cargoCategoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND (CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE LIKE #{cargoCategoryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND (CARGO_TYPE_CODE = #{cargoTypeCode})
ORDER BY CARGO_TYPE_CODE, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE

SELECT ID, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, CARGO_TYPE_CODE, CARGO_TYPE_NAME, SORT_NUM, DEL_FLAG, MAIN_NAME, MAIN_MOBILE, MINOR_NAME, MINOR_MOBILE, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, update_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM M_CARGO_CATEGORY WHERE ID = #{id}

SELECT ID, BHT_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, WORK_TYPE, TALLY, YARD_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, YARD_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, CARGO_COLOR, SORT_NUM, DEL_FLAG, SIGN, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, update_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SHORTHAND_CODE, UPDATE_POINT, DISPATCH_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, DISPATCH_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, FLOW_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, FLOW_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, FIXED_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, FIXED_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, STATUS, FLOAT_TON FROM M_CARGO
DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND (CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE = #{cargoCategoryCode})
AND (CARGO_CODE LIKE #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND (BHT_ID LIKE #{bhtId,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND (CARGO_NAME LIKE #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND (CARGO_NAME LIKE #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
ORDER BY CARGO_CODE

SELECT ID, BHT_ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, WORK_TYPE, TALLY, YARD_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, YARD_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, CARGO_COLOR, SORT_NUM, DEL_FLAG, SIGN, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, update_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SHORTHAND_CODE, UPDATE_POINT, DISPATCH_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, DISPATCH_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, FLOW_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, FLOW_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, FIXED_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, FIXED_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, STATUS, FLOAT_TON FROM M_CARGO
DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND (CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE = #{cargoCategoryCode})
AND (CARGO_CODE LIKE #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND (BHT_ID LIKE #{bhtId,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND (CARGO_NAME LIKE #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND (CARGO_NAME LIKE #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
ORDER BY CARGO_CODE

SELECT t.ID, t.BHT_ID, t.CARGO_CODE, t.CARGO_NAME, t.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, t.WORK_TYPE, t.TALLY, t.YARD_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, t.YARD_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, t.DISPATCH_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, t.DISPATCH_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, t.FLOW_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, t.FLOW_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, t.FIXED_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, t.FIXED_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, t.CARGO_COLOR, t.SORT_NUM, t.DEL_FLAG, t.SIGN, t.CREATE_BY, t.create_by_name, t.CREATE_TIME, t.UPDATE_BY, t.update_BY_NAME, t.UPDATE_TIME, t.SHORTHAND_CODE, t.UPDATE_POINT, t1.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, t1.CARGO_TYPE_NAME, t.STATUS, t.FLOAT_TON FROM M_CARGO t LEFT JOIN M_CARGO_CATEGORY t1 ON t.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE = t1.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE
t.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND (t.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE = #{cargoCategoryCode})
AND (t.CARGO_CODE LIKE #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND (t.CARGO_NAME LIKE #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND (t.CARGO_NAME LIKE #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND t1.CARGO_TYPE_CODE = #{cargoTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND (t1.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME LIKE #{cargoCategoryNameTMP,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND t.STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
ORDER BY t.CARGO_CODE

SELECT mc.ID , mc.SORT_NUM , mc.SHORTHAND_CODE , mc.SIGN , mcc.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME , mcc.CARGO_TYPE_NAME, mc.CARGO_NAME , mc.WORK_TYPE, CASE WHEN mc.WORK_TYPE = '1' THEN '件' WHEN mc.WORK_TYPE = '2' THEN '散' END "workTypeName", mc.OUTWARD_TYPE , mc.OUTWARD_TYPE_NAME FROM M_CARGO mc LEFT JOIN M_CARGO_CATEGORY mcc ON mc.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE = MCC.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE
mc.DEL_FLAG = '0'
AND (mc.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE = #{cargoCategoryCode})
AND (mc.CARGO_CODE LIKE #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND (mc.CARGO_NAME LIKE #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND (mc.CARGO_NAME LIKE #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND mcc.CARGO_TYPE_CODE = #{cargoTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
AND (mcc.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME LIKE #{cargoCategoryNameTMP,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND mc.STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
ORDER BY mc.SORT_NUM

SELECT ID, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, WORK_TYPE, YARD_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, YARD_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, DISPATCH_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, DISPATCH_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, FLOW_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, FLOW_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, FIXED_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, FIXED_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, TALLY, CARGO_COLOR, SORT_NUM, DEL_FLAG, SIGN, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, update_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, SHORTHAND_CODE, UPDATE_POINT, STATUS, FLOAT_TON FROM M_CARGO WHERE ID = #{id}

SELECT mc.ID, mc.CARGO_CODE, mc.CARGO_NAME, mc.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, mcc.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, mc.WORK_TYPE, mc.YARD_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, mc.YARD_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, mc.DISPATCH_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, mc.DISPATCH_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, mc.FLOW_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, mc.FLOW_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, mc.FIXED_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, mc.FIXED_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, mc.TALLY, mc.CARGO_COLOR, mc.SORT_NUM, mc.DEL_FLAG, mc.SIGN, mc.CREATE_BY, mc.create_by_name, mc.CREATE_TIME, mc.UPDATE_BY, mc.update_BY_NAME, mc.UPDATE_TIME, mc.SHORTHAND_CODE, mc.UPDATE_POINT, mc.STATUS, mc.FLOAT_TON, mc.OUTWARD_TYPE FROM M_CARGO mc LEFT JOIN M_CARGO_CATEGORY mcc ON mcc.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE = mc.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE WHERE mc.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_CARGO_CATEGORY ( ID, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, CARGO_TYPE_CODE, CARGO_TYPE_NAME, SORT_NUM, DEL_FLAG, MAIN_NAME, MAIN_MOBILE, MINOR_NAME, MINOR_MOBILE, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoCategoryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCategoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortNum,jdbcType=BIGINT}, '0', #{mainName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mainMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{minorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{minorMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now} )

INSERT INTO M_CARGO (ID , CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, WORK_TYPE, TALLY, CARGO_COLOR, SORT_NUM, DEL_FLAG, SIGN, YARD_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, YARD_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, DISPATCH_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, DISPATCH_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, FLOW_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, FLOW_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, FIXED_SALARY_TYPE_CODE, FIXED_SALARY_TYPE_NAME, CREATE_BY, create_by_name, CREATE_TIME, SHORTHAND_CODE, UPDATE_POINT, BHT_ID, FLOAT_TON ) VALUES ( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCategoryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{tally,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{cargoColor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, '0', #{sign,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{yardSalaryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{yardSalaryTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dispatchSalaryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dispatchSalaryTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{flowSalaryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{flowSalaryTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fixedSalaryTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fixedSalaryTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now}, #{shorthandCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updatePoint,jdbcType=INTEGER}, CARGOM_CARGO.nextval, #{floatTon,jdbcType=INTEGER} )
mapper.update: UPDATE M_CARGO_CATEGORY SET DEL_FLAG = '1' WHERE ID = #{id}

UPDATE M_CARGO_CATEGORY SET CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE = #{cargoCategoryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR }, CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME =#{cargoCategoryName,jdbcType=VARCHAR }, CARGO_TYPE_CODE = #{cargoTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR }, CARGO_TYPE_NAME = #{cargoTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR }, SORT_NUM =#{sortNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR }, MAIN_NAME =#{mainName,jdbcType=VARCHAR }, MAIN_MOBILE =#{mainMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR }, MINOR_NAME =#{minorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR }, MINOR_MOBILE =#{minorMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR }, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, update_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME =#{now} WHERE ID = #{id}

UPDATE M_CARGO SET CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_NAME = #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE = #{cargoCategoryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_TYPE = #{workType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, TALLY = #{tally,jdbcType=INTEGER}, CARGO_COLOR = #{cargoColor,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SORT_NUM = #{sortNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, YARD_SALARY_TYPE_CODE = #{yardSalaryTypeCode,jdbcType=INTEGER}, YARD_SALARY_TYPE_NAME = #{yardSalaryTypeName,jdbcType=INTEGER}, DISPATCH_SALARY_TYPE_CODE = #{dispatchSalaryTypeCode,jdbcType=INTEGER}, DISPATCH_SALARY_TYPE_NAME = #{dispatchSalaryTypeName,jdbcType=INTEGER}, FLOW_SALARY_TYPE_CODE = #{flowSalaryTypeCode,jdbcType=INTEGER}, FLOW_SALARY_TYPE_NAME = #{flowSalaryTypeName,jdbcType=INTEGER}, FIXED_SALARY_TYPE_CODE = #{fixedSalaryTypeCode,jdbcType=INTEGER}, FIXED_SALARY_TYPE_NAME = #{fixedSalaryTypeName,jdbcType=INTEGER}, SIGN = #{sign,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, update_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME =#{now}, SHORTHAND_CODE = #{shorthandCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_POINT = #{updatePoint,jdbcType=INTEGER}, FLOAT_TON = #{floatTon,jdbcType=INTEGER}, OUTWARD_TYPE = #{outwardType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, OUTWARD_TYPE_NAME = #{outwardTypeName} WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CARGO_NAME, CARGO_CODE FROM M_CARGO WHERE BHT_ID = #{bhtId} ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT CARGO_NAME FROM M_CARGO WHERE CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode}

SELECT CASE WHEN MAX(TO_NUMBER(CARGO_CODE)) IS NULL THEN #{cargoCategoryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '0001' ELSE #{cargoCategoryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} || to_char( LPAD(TO_NUMBER(substr(MAX(CARGO_CODE), LENGTH(#{cargoCategoryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})+1 ))+1, LENGTH(substr(MAX(CARGO_CODE),LENGTH(#{cargoCategoryCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})+1 )) ,'0')) END FROM M_CARGO WHERE CARGO_CODE LIKE #{cargoCategoryCodeLike,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
